channel.title: Trending repositories on GitHub today · GitHub
channel.description: Trending repositories on GitHub today · GitHub - Powered by RSSHub

item.title: Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard
item.description:
The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.

Language: Rust
Stars: 3627
Forks: 132
item.author: Dicklesworthstone

item.title: moeru-ai/airi
item.description:
💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

Language: TypeScript
Stars: 41678
Forks: 4182
item.author: moeru-ai

item.title: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
item.description:
100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.

Language: Python
Stars: 119209
Forks: 17708
item.author: Shubhamsaboo

item.title: Nutlope/hallmark
item.description:
Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.

Language: CSS
Stars: 4742
Forks: 265
item.author: Nutlope

item.title: Raphire/Win11Debloat
item.description:
A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.

Language: PowerShell
Stars: 50529
Forks: 2038
item.author: Raphire

item.title: Graphify-Labs/graphify
item.description:
AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.

Language: Python
Stars: 83851
Forks: 8270
item.author: Graphify-Labs

item.title: hasaneyldrm/exercises-dataset
item.description:
1,324-exercise fitness dataset — animation GIFs, 180×180 thumbnails, muscle-group & equipment data, and step-by-step instructions in 6 languages. The exercise data layer behind the LogPress app.

Language: HTML
Stars: 12257
Forks: 1436
item.author: hasaneyldrm

item.title: github/spec-kit
item.description:
💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development

Language: Python
Stars: 120275
Forks: 10669
